title: polygonaceae
intro: The Polygonaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as buckwheat or smartweed families, which includes about 40 genera and 800 species. This family is characterized by its unique inflorescence structures, often in the form of spikes or panicles, and typically features small, greenish flowers. Polygonaceae plants are primarily found in temperate and subtropical regions worldwide, and many species are cultivated for their edible seeds or leaves. The family is often divided into two subgroups: the Polygonoideae, which includes buckwheat and knotweed, and the Rumicoideae, which includes smartweed and wild buckwheat.
